title: APM: Clickjacking - Missing Frame Protection Headers
description: Detects HTTP responses missing X-Frame-Options or Content-Security-Policy frame-ancestors directives, indicating vulnerability to clickjacking attacks. Monitors APM response headers for missing security controls.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and (('Response Code' = '200' and 'Content Type' like '*text/html*') and not (('Response Headers' like '*X-Frame-Options*' or 'Response Headers' like '*frame-ancestors*'))) | stats count as MissingHeaders by 'Request URL', 'Service Name' | sort -MissingHeaders
falsepositives: Public pages intentionally designed to be embeddable
